prompt: Tôi muốn đóng gói offer cho dịch vụ coaching 1-1 của mình. UX designer 8 năm exp, coach junior lên mid/senior. 3 tháng, 1 buổi/tuần (60 phút), giá 30-50 triệu. Em giúp tôi package offer Hormozi nhé.

assertions.text: All 3 output files exist: offer.md, offer.json, conversion-copy.md
offer.md shows evidence skill ran Mode C interview — has surfaced specific pain/gain not in original prompt (vd portfolio building, FAANG interview, agency feedback gap, salary plateau)
Dream outcome cụ thể: includes specific seniority jump + timeframe + measurable signal (vd 'lên Senior Designer trong 6 tháng + portfolio đậu offer Senior 25M-35M+/tháng')
Bonuses appropriate for high-touch 1-on-1 coaching: Voxer/Telegram access, playbook, mastermind, recording library, NOT consumer course templates like '50 email templates'
Guarantee suited for high-ticket coaching: service guarantee ('work until success'), conditional, or better-than-money-back. NOT 14-day simple refund.
STANDARD price in 30-50M range as user specified. PREMIUM can extend to 60-90M. All charm numbers.
Stack value / STANDARD price ratio is between 8x and 15x
Uses 'anh/chị' addressing throughout, NOT 'bạn'. Vietnamese throughout.
Core offer has named unique mechanism (Magic Bean Story) — phương pháp X có Y bước, not generic '12 sessions coaching'
offer.json is valid JSON with required keys: anchor, value_equation, core_offer, bonuses, guarantee, urgency, pricing, conversion_copy
Conversion copy uses language/pain points specifically resonating with junior designer (portfolio, feedback, career growth, design system), not generic 'kiếm tiền online'
